objective: Close F-0074 by making the material paper-reference read model include paper_question material_snapshot facts for ungrouped questions, retain question_group references for empty groups, deduplicate papers across both sources, and keep reference counts aligned with the published-paper lock source. Do not change schema, execute a database, change paper composition semantics, or address independent paper identity findings.
blockedFiles: schema, migration or persistent database execution
paper composition, question_group validation or snapshot write semantics
F-0094, F-0096, F-0097, F-0098 or other independent finding
permission, Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.uiApiCallers: Material list and detail UI consume references.papers through the existing mapper and service; no DTO or UI change is required.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routeService: Material routes delegate unchanged to material-service, which returns repository rows and preserves reference arrays.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repository: material-repository currently derives paper references only from question_group.material_id. paper_question.material_snapshot is the published lock fact source and can contain a materialPublicId even when question_group_id is null.
authoritativeChainEvidence.schema: Existing material.public_id and paper_question.material_snapshot JSONB are sufficient. No schema or migration source is needed.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: A repository-focused pure merge contract will cover snapshot-only references, question_group-only empty-group references and cross-source deduplication; service, phase-9, UI and P0 aggregate regressions must remain green.
authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: US-02-06 AC-2/AC-4 require published-reference lock correctness and visible question/paper reference lists; module 02 explicitly allows a question to carry material without requiring a question_group.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: No real PostgreSQL execution, query-plan claim, paper composition mutation, schema, permission, Provider, dependency or mechanism change.
